since_last: 29% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.07%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 29% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.08% · BTC +0.08% · Gold -0.72% · Nasdaq100 -0.95%. 29% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.07%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.07%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.26%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: OKLO is the standout at -8.88%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.61%, INTU +3.12%, BIDU +3.12%, ISRG +2.89%, ZBRA +2.52%. Laggards: OKLO -8.88%, SMR -8.67%, SKHY -8.53%, MRVL -7.42%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.65% at $134.39
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
